mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, description, price, stock_quantity, category, image_url, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stockQuantity}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category, image_url, status, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, category = #{category}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE products SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{delta}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY category
